; Favorites + Tags ADAPTED FROM FouzR's "favTagButton.qmd" (GPL-3.0-only) — original author FouzR:
;   https://github.com/FouzR/xovi-extensions/blob/main/3.27/favTagButton.qmd
; favBut/tagBut + favClicked/tagClicked + the Action button template are FouzR's (verbatim). Added by
; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci), 2026-06-18: My Files + Trash buttons, signals, handlers.
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions
;           qt-resource-rebuilder

AFFECT [[13636194074538366841]]
	TRAVERSE [[6502786168]]#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {
			signal myFilesClicked
			signal favClicked
			signal ~&8400109052643843316&~
			signal myTrashClicked
		}

		TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#[[16596251247453125840]] > [[254501558939456351]]#[[6391657810197849963]]
			LOCATE BEFORE ALL
			INSERT {
				~&7081201431623&~ {
					~&5972374&~: myFilesBut
					~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&16239278111605497701&~: ~&7082729686082&~

					~&477346483278530855&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~
					~&16400203684079186719&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16400203684079186719&~
					~&15639918876026341067&~: ~&6504254477&~
					~&12473595850146141341&~: [~&"233737316206498&~, ~&"7082656280847&~, ~&"7834776425552261693&~]
					~&5336234142035948531&~: ~&6504254477&~.myFilesClicked()
					~&233748328658231&~: myFilesBut.~&12473595850146141341&~.~&7713146641368448&~(~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~)
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"8609871700517419816&~
				}
				~&7081201431623&~ {
					~&5972374&~: favBut
					~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&16239278111605497701&~: ~&7082729686082&~

					~&477346483278530855&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~
					~&16400203684079186719&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16400203684079186719&~
					~&15639918876026341067&~: ~&6504254477&~
					~&12473595850146141341&~: [~&"233737316206498&~, ~&"7082656280847&~, ~&"7834776425552261693&~]
					~&5336234142035948531&~: ~&6504254477&~.favClicked()
					~&233748328658231&~: favBut.~&12473595850146141341&~.~&7713146641368448&~(~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~)
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446772117066&~
				}
				~&7081201431623&~ {
					~&5972374&~: tagBut
					~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&16239278111605497701&~: ~&7082729686082&~

					~&477346483278530855&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~
					~&16400203684079186719&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16400203684079186719&~
					~&15639918876026341067&~: ~&6504254477&~
					~&12473595850146141341&~: [~&"233737316206498&~, ~&"7082656280847&~, ~&"7834776425552261693&~]
					~&5336234142035948531&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&8400109052643843316&~()
					~&233748328658231&~: tagBut.~&12473595850146141341&~.~&7713146641368448&~(~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~)
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"13873223703509132460&~
				}
			}
		END TRAVERSE

		TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#[[16596251247453125840]] > [[254501558939456351]]#[[6391657810197849963]]
			LOCATE AFTER ALL
			INSERT {
				~&7081201431623&~ {
					~&5972374&~: trashBut
					~&7081629735527&~.~&254522510204479688&~: ~&5971598&~.~&14019785274593562237&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&8399470807760157065&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&7081629735527&~.~&16239278111605497701&~: ~&7082729686082&~

					~&477346483278530855&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~
					~&16400203684079186719&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&16400203684079186719&~
					~&15639918876026341067&~: ~&6504254477&~
					~&12473595850146141341&~: [~&"233737316206498&~, ~&"7082656280847&~, ~&"7834776425552261693&~]
					~&5336234142035948531&~: ~&6504254477&~.myTrashClicked()
					~&233748328658231&~: trashBut.~&12473595850146141341&~.~&7713146641368448&~(~&6504254477&~.~&6504391364&~)
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"8609871989899886756&~
				}
			}
		END TRAVERSE

	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
	TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]#[[6504254477]] > [[8398086935686413746.8397858752669353458]]#[[8399343920170215954]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			onMyFilesClicked: { ~&6504254477&~.~&16350671005492501836&~(~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&233695951282018&~)}
			onFavClicked: { ~&6504254477&~.~&16350671005492501836&~(~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&254484085475697148&~)}
			~&16346801949393823249&~: { ~&6504254477&~.~&16350671005492501836&~(~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&6503160856&~)}
			onMyTrashClicked: { ~&6504254477&~.~&16350671005492501836&~(~&456860916926733567&~.~&6503241380&~.~&214604912747&~)}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
